major.comment: Major release: strongly-typed publish/subscribe event bus with full TypeScript event map inference; on/once/emit with typed payloads; AbortSignal integration on all subscription methods; promise-based wait() for one-time events; async generator events() for pull-based consumption; listenerCount per event or global; onEmit and onError lifecycle hooks; BusDisposedError for safe teardown; [Symbol.dispose]() support
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>
